stemHtml: A last minute change to the weight and balance of an aircraft adds more weight in a forward area. The aircraft remains within limits after the weight addition; what will happen to the stabiliser trim for take-off?

options.a: Set trim nose-down, leading edge up.
options.b: Set trim nose-up, leading edge down.
options.c: Set trim nose-up, leading edge up.
options.d: Set trim nose-down, leading edge down.
